rationale: The citing-paper note emphasizes retail-format effects on packaged-food quantity/quality using panel data, IV, and DiD, and it does not explicitly mention moral licensing or self-concept mechanisms from the 2006 licensing paper. The cited paper is a behavioral-experiment theory source on licensing, so it could still be a conceptual background citation, but the raw evidence provides only a DOI match with no in-text context. Given this sparse, mixed evidence, it is not safe to drop outright.
